0.name: Pepper_bell_Bacterial_spot
0.description: Bacterial spot on bell pepper leaves
0.treatment: Apply copper-based fungicides. Remove infected plants.

2.name: Potato_Early_blight
2.description: Dark brown spots with concentric rings on potato leaves
2.treatment: Apply chlorothalonil or mancozeb. Rotate crops.

3.name: Potato_Late_blight
3.description: Water-soaked lesions expanding rapidly on potato

5.name: Tomato_Bacterial_spot
5.description: Small dark spots on tomato leaves and fruit
5.treatment: Apply copper hydroxide. Use disease-free seeds.

6.name: Tomato_Early_blight
6.description: Target-like spots on older tomato leaves

7.name: Tomato_Late_blight
7.treatment: Apply systemic fungicide. Remove infected plants.

8.name: Tomato_Leaf_Mold
8.description: Yellow spots with olive-green mold on tomato

9.name: Tomato_Septoria_leaf_spot
9.description: Circular spots with dark borders on tomato
9.treatment: Apply copper fungicides. Remove lower leaves.

10.name: Tomato_Spider_mites
10.description: Stippling and yellowing on tomato leaves
10.treatment: Apply insecticidal soap or neem oil.

11.name: Tomato_Target_Spot
11.description: Lesions with concentric rings on tomato

12.name: Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus
12.description: Yellowing and curling of tomato leaves
12.treatment: Control whitefly vectors. Use resistant varieties.

13.name: Tomato_Mosaic_Virus
13.description: Mottled light and dark green patterns on tomato

15.name: Apple_scab
15.description: Olive-green to brown spots on apple leaves
15.treatment: Apply fungicides in spring. Rake fallen leaves.

16.name: Apple_Black_rot
16.description: Brown lesions on apple leaves and fruit
16.treatment: Prune dead wood. Apply fungicides during bloom.

17.name: Apple_Cedar_apple_rust
17.treatment: Remove nearby cedar trees. Apply fungicides.

20.name: Cherry_Powdery_mildew
20.description: White powdery growth on cherry leaves
20.treatment: Apply sulfur fungicides. Improve air circulation.

22.name: Corn_Cercospora_leaf_spot
22.description: Rectangular tan to gray lesions on corn

23.name: Corn_Common_rust
23.treatment: Apply fungicides if severe. Plant resistant varieties.

24.name: Corn_Northern_Leaf_Blight
24.description: Long elliptical gray-green lesions on corn
24.treatment: Apply foliar fungicides. Use resistant hybrids.

26.name: Grape_Black_rot
26.description: Reddish-brown spots on grape leaves and fruit
26.treatment: Apply fungicides before and after bloom.

27.name: Grape_Esca
27.treatment: Prune affected wood. Remove infected vines.

28.name: Grape_Leaf_blight
28.description: Angular brown spots on grape leaves

30.name: Orange_Haunglongbing
30.treatment: Control Asian citrus psyllid. Remove infected trees.

31.name: Peach_Bacterial_spot
31.treatment: Apply copper-based products. Avoid overhead irrigation.

35.name: Squash_Powdery_mildew
35.description: White powdery spots on squash leaves
35.treatment: Apply sulfur or neem oil. Improve air circulation.
